title: man page crossrefs: add --filter autocompletes
body:
For all commands with a --filter option, cross-reference
against man pages, and vice-versa.

I'm sorry. I know this script has gone off the deep end.

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>
```release-note
None
```

comments.body:
Thanks for the feedback. This is ready for review, and should pass CI (but I won't be around today to check).

One more question, for future consideration: we have a mishmash where some man pages use asterisks (italics) for filters, and some don't. The script just strips asterisks. Do we want to establish a consistent usage? (Not in this PR, it would make it too huge. In a followup.)

I think consistency would be good.
LGTM
